name: Hussain Infotech - Cuttlefish Bone for All Birds - 100 Gram Pigeons/ Parrots, Finches/African Grey/Macaw/Budgies
description: Calcium Carbonate, which makes up 85 percent of cuttlebone, is the most important component. Organic material, which makes up 8.9% of Cuttlebone and is mostly carbohydrate material, is the second most important component. Cuttlebone Is An Important Dietary Supplement For Birds Because It Is A Good Source Of Minerals And Calcium, Both Of Which Help Birds Form Bones And Clot Blood. It's a natural product that's free of toxins and contaminants. Most artificial mineral blocks, on the other hand, are made of Plaster of Paris.
